reviews.review_description: I cannot find away to switch from chess to checkers!!! ugh!!!
Can't change from chess to checkers

It is a bare bones checkers vr game.

There is no special boards, game modes, etc. There is not even a way to pick up pieces. You must drag and drop.

But if you want a pure checkers vr game, well this is the one since there is not any competition.

Feel free to use this link for 25% off:
https://www.oculus.com/ appreferrals/Lu_Million/5401144369900559/?utm_source=2

I really enjoyed playing this game.  Simple yet, not boring.  

A few suggestions: 

1) A few more locations to play in.  
2) More choices of music. Love Boogie-Woogie, but it was not around in the old west. Maybe an old west-style song
3) More selection of A.I. players instead of just the two. 
4) The ability to play against friends and family around the world. 
5) There are times the game FORCES you to move a particular piece, one that I did not want to move, and was leaving it as a diversion because I have better & bigger plans. 
6) Levels:  Easy, normal, hard, expert, etc... 
7) Have the A.I. get better as you get better.  
8) Different colors for the checkers. (red, blue, pink, yellow, etc...) 

This game has great potential!

developer_response.body: Hi JeffRichards, thanks for your thoughtful review. Any of your suggestions will be taken into consideration. Do believe that my team attaches great importance to the experience of every user and keep an eye on the updates. Please don't hesitate to join our Discord(https://discord.gg/y5UyeweTB5) to talk with other players and our support team. Looking forward to your further feedbacks

reviews.review_description: I wish more developers would create board games for the Quest. This one is enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Hi, therealrick, thank you very much for enjoying our game and the board games, we have also developed other board games. For more information, please join our Discord server(https://discord.gg/Uc2kAV9w5e) to try all our board games in advance as a test user. We're looking forward to more suggestions from you.

reviews.review_description: Where is the online mode to be able to play with freinds? Indicates that you can do this but no option?

developer_response.body: Hi Guvner57, thanks for your feedback. I'm so sorry for the misunderstanding. We're developing online mode as you suggested. Please keep an eye on the updates. Please don't hesitate to join our discord(https://discord.gg/y5UyeweTB5) to talk with other players. We're looking forward to your feedbacks again.

reviews.review_title: I thought this was a Checkers game
reviews.review_description: I purchased this but the only option is a Chess game with different Intl rules.  I was under the impression I was purchasing a Checkers game.  What's going on?

developer_response.body:
Hi Tradeportman,

Thank you for your feedback. We want to assure you that our game is indeed a Checkers game, not Chess. To better assist you, could you please provide us with a screenshot of the game as it appears on your device? You can send the screenshot to our email at contact@vrsuplife.com or via our Discord channel https://discord.com/invite/kxwvxSdtKY. This will help us understand the issue more clearly and ensure a swift resolution. We are committed to providing a great gaming experience and your assistance in this matter is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,
Suplife
